message:
Fix metadata tests for native provider patterns

Update 4 failing tests in provider_metadata_comprehensive.rs to account
for native providers (Vertex, Bedrock) that have routing_defaults with
empty base_url and non-OpenAI API families:

- native_adapter_providers: allow routing_defaults (for context_window etc)
- base_url uniqueness: skip empty URLs (native providers build URLs differently)
- base_url non-empty: only enforce for OpenAICompatiblePreset providers
- known API families: add google-vertex, bedrock-converse-stream, gitlab-chat

112 metadata tests now passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
